data.body: api-compat (Pass-1): The change flips the default of `REBAR_SYNC_PUSH` / `sync.push` from `"always"` to `"off"` in the env-var fallback. This is an unversioned config backward-compat break (a changed default altering existing behavior) at 0.6.0. Documented default is `"always"` in README.md:415, docs/config.md:127, and src/rebar/_store/push.py:4,44-46 (the ConfigError fallback still returns "always"). Every user who never set REBAR_SYNC_PUSH now silently stops auto-pushing writes; fsck reports PUSH_PENDING. Flagging for the four-pass review.
